eligibility.label: Minimum personal net worth of $500,000 CAD
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Personal net worth ($${personalNetWorth}) is below the $500,000 minimum required

eligibility.label: Minimum CLB 4 in English or French
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Language proficiency does not meet the minimum CLB 4 requirement

eligibility.label: Minimum 3 years of business ownership or senior management experience
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Business ownership/management experience does not meet the 3-year minimum

eligibility.label: Minimum $300,000 CAD personal investment
eligibility.disqualifyMessage: Investment capacity ($${investmentCapacity}) is below the $300,000 minimum
